content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 5.6.1 / 5.6.3 WARN — RatingGateView.swift routes users to a custom star-rating gate that filters by score (stars≥4 → itms-apps write-review deep link; stars<4 → external feedback form), instead of using `SKStoreReviewController`/`requestReview`, and description.txt explicitly asks users to "rate us 5 stars" (App/RatingGateView.swift:9-20, fastlane/metadata/en-US/description.txt:1).

Pierre: Apple explicitly prohibits gating or filtering App Store review prompts based on the user's answer, and requires the system `requestReview()` API rather than deep-linking to the write-review page — this pattern is a textbook 5.6.3 violation and a near-certain rejection. Replace the custom gate with `SKStoreReviewController.requestReviewInCurrentScene()` (or `requestReview()` in SwiftUI) shown to all users unconditionally, and drop the "rate us 5 stars" language from the description since it also solicits a specific rating.
